nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A stylized, full-body cinematic shot of a cybernetic detective walking through a minimalist, misty street. Back view, following the detective. The detective wears a dark geometric trench coat and a fedora. Smooth camera movement, noir atmosphere, flat white background with subtle fog
